name: Product Requirements Swarm v1.0
description: Transforms a plain-text feature request into a structured PRD with user stories, technical feasibility, UX flows, and security requirements. Phase 1 of the OpenClaw Full SDLC Pipeline.
author: Optimus
changes: Initial release: 6 agents (intake-parser, product-strategist, technical-feasibility, ux-flow-designer, security-compliance, prd-compiler)
Structured JSON output contracts for all agents
PRD JSON schema with conflict resolution and completeness checks
